issue: I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: Access restoration requests must be submitted by a workspace owner or admin. Please ask your workspace admin to restore your access, or have your IT administrator contact support with account verification details.
justification: Non-owner/non-admin requesting account access restoration — requires admin verification and cannot be processed without account authority.

issue: I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, increase my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: HackerRank support is unable to modify assessment scores or influence hiring decisions. Assessment results are final and determined by the platform's automated grading. If you believe there was a technical error during the test, please contact the recruiter or company directly.
justification: Request asks to change an assessment score and influence a hiring decision — both are outside support authority and involve exam integrity.

issue: I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: Your refund request requires review by our billing team. For disputes involving merchants, contact your Visa card-issuing bank directly — they can initiate a chargeback process on your behalf. Visa has an efficient dispute resolution process through your card issuer.
justification: Request demands immediate refund and merchant ban — both require human review, account verification, and card issuer action beyond automated support scope.

issue: I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time. I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment. Thank you for your understanding and support.
response: Assessment rescheduling cannot be arranged through HackerRank support directly. Please reach out to the recruiter or hiring team at the company that invited you — they have the ability to extend test deadlines or resend invitations.
justification: Assessment rescheduling requires action from the recruiting company. HackerRank support cannot reschedule on behalf of candidates.

issue: Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby. The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response: Based on HackerRank Interviews documentation: candidates are automatically moved back to the virtual lobby when all interviewers leave the interview session. If interviewers are watching a screen share without active interaction on HackerRank, the system may detect them as inactive and trigger the lobby redirect. To prevent this: 1. Interviewers should periodically interact with the HackerRank interface during screen shares. 2. Virtual Lobby and inactivity settings can be reviewed by a Company Admin under Interview Settings. For adjusting specific inactivity timeout thresholds, please contact HackerRank support — these may require account-level configuration.
justification: Corpus contains documentation on virtual lobby behavior and candidate/interviewer session management. Partial answer provided from interviews documentation.

issue: it's not working, help

justification: Ticket is too vague to identify the product or issue type. Replied requesting clarification rather than escalating an unactionable request.

issue: Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove or deactivate an interviewer from your HackerRank for Work account, you need Company Admin access. Steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account. 2. Click your profile icon in the upper-right corner and select Admin Panel. 3. In the Admin Panel, click your profile icon and select User Management. 4. Use the search bar to locate the interviewer. 5. Select the user and choose Deactivate User. Note: The three-dots menu in the interview interface is for in-session settings only. User removal is done through the Admin Panel.
justification: Corpus contains user management documentation with deactivation steps accessible via Admin Panel. Answered directly from corpus.

issue: My identity has been stolen, wat should I do
subject: Identity Theft
response: This is a serious situation requiring immediate action: 1. Contact your Visa card issuer immediately to block your card and report the theft. 2. Call Visa Global Customer Assistance at +1 303 967 1090 (available 24/7) for emergency assistance. 3. Report the identity theft to local authorities. Your card issuer can block your card within approximately 30 minutes of being reported and can arrange emergency support.
justification: Identity theft is a high-risk fraud case requiring immediate human assistance — cannot be resolved via automated support.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: You can update the name on your certificate directly — note that you can only do this once per account, and the change applies to all certificates. Steps: 1. Open your certificate page on HackerRank Community. 2. In the Full Name field, enter the correct name. 3. Click Regenerate Certificate. 4. In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name. The platform will update your certificate with the new name.
justification: Corpus contains exact steps for updating certificate name from the Certifications FAQ. Answered directly from documentation.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge on your Visa card: 1. Contact your card-issuing bank directly — they are the primary point of contact for chargebacks and disputes. 2. Provide the transaction details including date, amount, and merchant name. 3. Your bank will initiate Visa's dispute resolution process on your behalf. For further guidance, you can download Visa's Dispute Management Guidelines from visa.co.in. For questions, contact your card issuer or acquirer.
justification: Corpus contains Visa dispute resolution process. Answered directly with documented steps for initiating a charge dispute.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for your responsible disclosure. To report a security vulnerability in Claude: 1. Submit details via Anthropic's Model Safety Bug Bounty Program reporting form. 2. For universal jailbreaks or ASL-3 safety concerns, use the Public Vulnerability Reporting form on Anthropic's site. 3. Include as much detail as possible: steps to reproduce, potential impact, and affected systems. Do not publicly disclose the vulnerability until Anthropic has had a chance to investigate.
justification: Corpus contains the Model Safety Bug Bounty Program documentation with reporting instructions. Answered directly from security documentation.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: To stop Anthropic's crawlers from indexing your website, add the following to your robots.txt file (repeat for each subdomain): User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: / To set a crawl delay instead: User-agent: ClaudeBot Crawl-delay: 1 Note: Blocking Anthropic IP addresses is not reliable as it may prevent reading your robots.txt. If crawlers appear to be malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain name.
justification: Corpus contains exact robots.txt instructions for blocking Anthropic crawlers. Answered directly from privacy documentation.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: You can use your Visa card to get a cash advance at any ATM displaying the Visa or Plus logo: 1. Insert your Visa card at a participating ATM. 2. Select Cash Advance or Credit Card Withdrawal. 3. Enter your PIN (contact your card issuer if you don't have one set). 4. Enter the amount you need. Note: Cash advances typically incur fees and interest from the date of withdrawal — check with your card issuer for your specific rates and limits. For emergency cash assistance while traveling, call Visa Global Customer Assistance at +1 303 967 1090 (available 24/7).
justification: Corpus contains Visa travel and cash assistance information. Provided cash advance guidance and emergency contact based on Visa support documentation.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: When you allow Claude to use your data to improve models, Anthropic implements privacy protections including automatically de-linking your data from your user ID before any review. For specific data retention periods, please refer to Anthropic's Privacy Policy at anthropic.com/privacy. To update your consent settings, you can adjust your privacy preferences in your Claude account settings.
justification: Corpus contains information on privacy protections for data used in model improvement. Answered with available corpus information and directed to Privacy Policy for retention specifics.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: To remove a departed employee from your HackerRank for Work account: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account. 2. Click your profile icon in the upper-right corner and select Admin Panel. 3. In the Admin Panel, click your profile icon and select User Management. 4. Use the search bar to locate the employee's account. 5. Select the user and choose Deactivate User. This revokes their platform access. You must have Company Admin access to perform this action.
justification: Corpus contains user management documentation with deactivation steps. Answered directly from the User Management guide.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: To set up Claude LTI integration for your students in Canvas LMS: 1. Sign in to Canvas as an administrator and go to Admin → Developer Keys. 2. Click + Developer Key then + LTI Key. 3. Enter the required configuration details for the Claude LTI integration. 4. Save the key and enable it for your institution. 5. Share the LTI key configuration with your students. For full step-by-step instructions, refer to the Claude for Education documentation: Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure. If you haven't set up a Claude for Education institutional account yet, contact Anthropic's education team.
justification: Corpus contains specific Claude LTI setup instructions for Canvas LMS under Claude for Education. Answered directly from education documentation.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: This is a permitted exception under Visa's rules. In the USA and US territories — including the US Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico, and Guam — merchants may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card purchases only. This exception does not apply to Visa debit cards. If a merchant requires a minimum exceeding US$10, or applies a minimum to a Visa debit card, please notify your Visa card issuer.
justification: Corpus contains the exact Visa policy on minimum transaction amounts for US territories including the US Virgin Islands. Answered directly from Visa consumer support documentation.
